---
title: "Bibliography"
bibliography: "MyPublications.bib"
csl: chicago-author-date-no-substitute.csl
nocite: |
  @*
citeproc: false
filters:
  - michaelaye/highlight-author
  - michaelaye/chronobib
highlight-author: "Aye"
chronobib:
  split-keyword: refereed
toc: false
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.panel-tabset}
## Refereed

::: {#refs-refereed}
:::

## Non-Refereed

::: {#refs-nonrefereed}
:::
:::
